items.name: ProjectKind
items.doc: What kind of project is this — determines which checks apply.

items.name: Layout
items.doc: Project layout — single crate or Cargo workspace.

items.name: detect
items.doc:
Detect project kind and layout. Explicit `[project].kind` in
`proj/rulestools.toml` overrides auto-detection.

items.name: is_registered
items.doc: Check if project has explicit registration (proj/rulestools.toml with [project].kind).

items.name: suggest
items.doc: Suggest the best matching ProjectKind for an unregistered project.

items.name: skipped_categories
items.doc: Check categories that are skipped for this project kind.

items.name: upgrade_ord
items.doc:
Numeric ordering for upgrade validation.
Higher values = more complex project kind.

items.name: as_str
items.doc: Human-readable kind string for config files and display.

items.name: allows_check
items.doc: Whether a check ID should run for this project kind.
